# Orbit — Live Demo Queue (Salem, OR)
> Orbit builds bilingual (EN/ES) websites, chatbots, and AI voice receptionists for local
> businesses. Below are live demo sites, each with its own /llms.txt.

## Demos
- https://jonathan777-ui.github.io/orbit-platform/permanent-marx-tattoo/ — Permanent Marx Tattoo Studio (Tattoo · Piercing)
- https://jonathan777-ui.github.io/orbit-platform/roots-deep-tattoo/ — Roots Deep Tattoo (Tattoo · Bilingual)
- https://jonathan777-ui.github.io/orbit-platform/alchemy-tattoo-collective/ — Alchemy Tattoo Collective (Tattoo · Piercing)
- https://jonathan777-ui.github.io/orbit-platform/my-living-canvas/ — My Living Canvas (Tattoo · Bilingual)
- https://jonathan777-ui.github.io/orbit-platform/addictions-bodyart/ — Addictions BodyArt (Piercing · Tattoo)
- https://jonathan777-ui.github.io/orbit-platform/desire-ink-lab/ — Desire Ink Lab (Tattoo · Bilingual)
- https://jonathan777-ui.github.io/orbit-platform/javis-fades/ — Javi's Fades (Barbershop · Bilingual)
- https://jonathan777-ui.github.io/orbit-platform/the-barbers/ — The Barbers (Barbershop · Bilingual)
- https://jonathan777-ui.github.io/orbit-platform/reds-barber-shop/ — Red's Barber Shop (Barbershop · Bilingual)
- https://jonathan777-ui.github.io/orbit-platform/johnnys-barbershop/ — Johnny's Barbershop (Barbershop · Bilingual)
- https://jonathan777-ui.github.io/orbit-platform/faded-inc/ — Faded Inc. (Barbershop · West Salem)
- https://jonathan777-ui.github.io/orbit-platform/michael-b-dye/ — The Law Offices of Michael B. Dye (Immigration · Bilingual)
- https://jonathan777-ui.github.io/orbit-platform/terrence-green-law/ — Terrence Green Law (Immigration · Bilingual)
- https://jonathan777-ui.github.io/orbit-platform/hernandez-law-office/ — Hernandez Law Office (Immigration · Bilingual)
- https://jonathan777-ui.github.io/orbit-platform/affordable-immigration/ — Affordable Immigration Services (Immigration · Bilingual)
- https://jonathan777-ui.github.io/orbit-platform/arellano-law-salem/ — Arellano Law Firm (Immigration · Bilingual)

## About
- Languages: English, Español
